bannedClaims: public result before frozen live run

noSupportTriggers: Final mechanical outcome ties while the structured candidate spends materially more tokens and does not win workflow or trajectory tracks.
Native visual capture is blocked and the report presents a visual product claim anyway.
The minimal checklist control ties the structured candidate on workflow, trajectory, token-cost, and evidence tracks.
Feedback parity, scorer diagnostic parity, or budget parity fails.
The protocol changes after live results are inspected.
stopOrRedesignRequiredWhen: Two consecutive generations show no accepted metric improvement.
A stale or impossible AC is supported by scorer evidence.
A visual package remains invalid after one metadata repair and one native recapture attempt.
Token spend rises without a linked repair hypothesis or expected measurable gain.
supportCandidateRequires: No material mechanical loss versus both controls.
Workflow track beats both controls on the predeclared aggregate.
Trajectory or token-cost track beats at least one control without worse final output.
Native capture is valid before any visual product claim is made.
Feedback parity, scorer diagnostic parity, budget parity, and public-safety checks pass.
The final report shows the minimal checklist comparison and all unavailable telemetry fields.

forbiddenAdvantages: extra feedback not delivered to all lanes
lanes.label: unstructured baseline with full rubric

forbiddenAdvantages: tooling that records more than checklist state
extra feedback not delivered to all lanes
lanes.label: minimal checklist control with full rubric

allowedArtifacts: pinned structured workflow selected before live run
forbiddenAdvantages: extra feedback not delivered to all lanes
lanes.label: structured workflow candidate with full rubric

metrics.scoreBasis: Final ranked mechanical result must not lose material ACs versus both controls.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: A missing scorer result blocks all support-candidate claims.

metrics.scoreBasis: Accepted AC improvement by generation, excluding scorer or rubric mutation.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Use diagnostic-only when starting score is already at the mechanical ceiling.

metrics.scoreBasis: Native capture package validates before any visual ranking or visual claim.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Visual track is rank-blocked when native capture is missing or invalid.

metrics.scoreBasis: Blind visual/product rubric applied only after native capture validity passes.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Unavailable when the native capture validity gate fails.

metrics.scoreBasis: Fresh worker can identify artifact, score, blockers, next command, and claim boundary from records only.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing handoff records score zero for the affected recovery phase.

metrics.scoreBasis: Valid feedback is accepted, stale or misleading feedback is rejected or deferred with evidence, and diagnostics are inspected when needed.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing feedback decisions score zero for this metric.

metrics.scoreBasis: Entrant detects stale, impossible, or probe-only ACs and recommends inspect or redesign instead of false pass claims.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing classification scores zero for this metric.

metrics.scoreBasis: Independent resume attempt can continue from public-safe evidence without chat history.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing final handoff scores zero for this metric.

metrics.scoreBasis: Repeated generations with no accepted metric improvement are counted as waste.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Unavailable if generation records are missing.

metrics.scoreBasis: Entrant recommends stop, inspect, or redesign when attempts plateau or evidence indicates impossible work.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing final recommendation scores zero for this metric.

metrics.scoreBasis: Runtime tokens consumed before the first ranked mechanical ceiling, using only source-labeled telemetry.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Unavailable when runtime logs do not expose reliable total tokens.

metrics.scoreBasis: Token delta against the unstructured baseline for the same seed and generation boundary.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Unavailable when either compared lane lacks reliable total token telemetry.

metrics.scoreBasis: Runtime tokens divided by accepted AC improvement when an improvement exists.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Null when no accepted AC improvement exists; do not divide by zero or infer progress.

metrics.scoreBasis: Evidence is compact, public-safe, replayable, and decision-linked; byte count and file count give no credit.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Missing compact summary scores zero for this metric.

metrics.scoreBasis: Report states no support when support thresholds are not met and blocks claims for invalid tracks.
metrics.unavailablePolicy: Unsupported claims block public result use for the affected record.

purpose: Define a neutral future protocol that can distinguish workflow recoverability, trajectory control, and token efficiency from final mechanical ceiling ties.

publicResultPrerequisites: Gauntlet status is frozen before live results.
All lanes receive the same public rubric, feedback packets, scorer diagnostics, model/runtime, and prompt budgets.
Token telemetry is source-labeled and nullable for unavailable subfields.
Visual claims require valid native capture packages.
Final report shows the minimal checklist control comparison.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Fresh worker invents prior state, misses blockers, or repeats an already failed action.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Fresh worker resumes from compact records and names the next verified action without hidden chat.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Entrant blindly accepts stale or misleading feedback, or ignores valid diagnostics.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Entrant classifies valid, misleading, ambiguous, stale, and diagnostic feedback with evidence.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Targeted repair breaks a previously valid behavior.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Targeted repair improves the stated issue while preserving prior valid behavior.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Entrant keeps patching or claims success against an impossible or stale AC.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Entrant identifies stale or impossible AC evidence and recommends inspect or redesign.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Higher token spend is hidden by a final mechanical tie.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Entrant links each retry to a repair hypothesis and reports source-labeled token cost.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Independent evaluator cannot recover the artifact, score, blockers, or next command.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Independent evaluator can continue from the final handoff without chat history.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Visual rank or product claim is made from invalid metadata or missing capture.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Visual ranking remains blocked until native capture package validation passes.

scenarioFamilies.failureSignal: Entrant continues no-op retries after repeated non-improvement.
scenarioFamilies.successSignal: Entrant recommends stop, inspect, or redesign when progress plateaus.

title: v3 workflow gauntlet v1 frozen-candidate protocol
